archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode Variant) meets Architectural Luxury

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Architectural Grid. Strict structural alignment. Use display:grid with gap-8 to gap-16.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px crisp lines (#20232E) to segment sections, avoiding soft box-shadows.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: slow fades, gentle slide reveals, subtle scale, layered scroll entrances, line-draw animations, soft node pulses, smooth hover depth, controlled parallax
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: subtle elevation via border-color change (from border_subtle to border_strong) and a very soft steel-blue glow. No bouncy transforms.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Layered architecture interactive scroll-reveal. Components slide in slowly from bottom (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20px to 0) with a 0.6s easing.

hero_background.description: Animated intelligence mesh. Node-and-connection network with subtle data-flow movement. Layered depth with slow parallax.
hero_background.colors: Nodes in soft off-white (opacity 0.4), connections in muted steel (opacity 0.2), occasional slow data packet traversing in azure (opacity 0.8).

image_urls.description: Neo Vertex Brand Logo (Circular monogram 'NV' in blue gradient)
Dark low-angle architectural metal structure (Use as very faint, 5% opacity overlay for capability blocks if needed)

navigation.style: Sticky minimal top nav. Solid background #05050A/80 with backdrop-blur-xl and a 1px border-b #20232E. z-50.

buttons.primary: Solid dark charcoal bg (#1A1C23) with a 1px border #2D313F. Text soft white. Hover: subtle steel-blue glow shadow.

cards.style: Flat background #12141A. 1px border #20232E. No soft drop shadows. Architectural precision.

form.style: Briefing request form (modal). Shadcn Dialog. Input fields: bg #05050A, border #20232E, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent_azure.

sections.name: Hero
sections.elements: Cinematic headline, minimal copy, CTA ('Request a Briefing'). Animated intelligence mesh background.

sections.name: Trust Strip
sections.elements: Understated enterprise indicators. Text marks only, 40% opacity (#9BA1B0).

sections.name: The Vertex Platform
sections.elements: Layered architecture visualization. Stacked visual layers: Orchestration, Reasoning Core, Memory Mesh, Data Substrate, Governance Plane. Scroll-reveal.

sections.name: Capabilities
sections.elements: 3-4 architectural blocks. Precise linework diagrams using SVGs. NOT standard card grids.

sections.name: Why Neo Vertex
sections.elements: 3-column value pillars. Calm, subtle hover depth.

sections.name: Vision / Manifesto
sections.elements: Large editorial typography. Single focal statement centered or strongly left-aligned with massive whitespace.

sections.name: Footer
sections.elements: Refined hierarchy. Grid layout. Logo + copyright + muted links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure strictly dark mode. Avoid Shadcn standard 'Cards' with soft shadows; use raw divs with 1px borders for an architectural feel. The hero must use a canvas/SVG animated mesh for the network effect. The 'Request a Briefing' CTA should trigger a Shadcn Dialog containing a form that saves to MongoDB. Include fields: name, work email, company, role, intent (select). ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes. Implement in React (.js/.jsx files) using Tailwind.
